LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS SALVADOR RAMOS AND 24 HOUR FITNESS USA, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AND HAS MET ALL THE FOURS UNDER THE CASE OF ROSTAI V. NESTE ENTERPRISES (2006) 138 CAL.APP.4TH 326. DEFENDANT HAS MET THEIR BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT THEY DID NOT OWE A DUTY OF CARE TO PLAINTIFF UNDER THE PRIMARY ASSUMPTION OF RISK DOCTRINE. EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS WERE RULED ON THE RECORD. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G) AND CRC 3.1312). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302)
